examples: Language: English is the official language, but Japanese and Chamorro (the local language) are also spoken.
Home to the Chamorro people, the island of Guam has struggled to maintain its cultural heritage, which has been traced back thousands of years.
Ethnic Composition: Residents are divided into 9 ethno-Linguistic groups, including a predominant number of Chamorro extraction. The indigenous population is Micronesian.
